name: Twin Flames Universe
description: An online spiritual community turned high-control group that mandates extensive digital surveillance, including location sharing, screen sharing, and live document editing of members' private thoughts.

surveillance_pillars.notes: Mandatory Life360, screen sharing software, shared Google Docs for confessions.
Members are paired as ‘twin flames’ and must report deviations.
Leaders monitor social media and issue public call-outs.

legal_status.details: Subject of documentaries and online exposés, but no criminal charges as of 2025.

sources.title: Inside Twin Flames Universe, the YouTube cult that makes members believe they are destined to be together
